description: Evals for S10 dv-coverage-closure: code/functional coverage analysis, exclusion file generation, test stubs, milestone checks, sign-off report

test_cases.name: APB-UART: full coverage closure from urg reports + S7/S9 data
test_cases.description: Parse simulated urg hier.txt/groups.txt, classify gaps, generate .el exclusion files, generate test stubs for coverable gaps, evaluate DV-I/DV-C/DV-F milestones, write dv_coverage_data.json and sign-off report.

assertions.description: scan_en toggle gap classified as excludable (matches _dft_ pattern)
assertions.check: classified_gaps.json contains scan_en entry with classification == excludable

assertions.description: Functional bin gaps classified as coverable
assertions.check: classified_gaps.json contains bin_max entry with classification == coverable

assertions.description: toggle_exclusions.el generated with EXCL_TOGGLE for scan_en
Test stub generated for bin_max functional gap
assertions.check: stubs/ contains a .sv file referencing cg_uart_tx AND bin_max

assertions.description: DV-F milestone fails due to toggle 90.8% < 95% threshold
assertions.check: milestone_results.json dv_f.passed == false AND blocking metric is toggle_pct

assertions.description: dv_coverage_data.json written with correct gap summary
assertions.check: dv_coverage_data.json exists AND gaps_summary.excluded >= 1 AND gaps_summary.stubs_generated >= 1

assertions.description: Sign-off report HTML generated and contains milestone section
assertions.check: signoff_report/index.html exists AND contains DV-I AND DV-C AND DV-F AND Coverage Dashboard

assertions.description: Sign-off banner shows NOT READY (DV-F not met)
assertions.check: signoff_report/index.html contains NOT READY OR DV-C COMPLETE

test_cases.name: Exclusion file: correct urg .el format for all exclusion types
test_cases.description: Verify that generated .el files use correct urg EXCL_LINE, EXCL_TOGGLE, EXCL_BRANCH, EXCL_FSM_STATE, EXCL_COVBIN syntax with -comment field.

CODE_TOG_0002.reason: Scan enable not driven in functional mode

FUNC_BIN_0004.reason: Parity disabled in all test configs

assertions.description: line_exclusions.el uses EXCL_LINE with file and line number
assertions.check: line_exclusions.el contains EXCL_LINE AND ctrl.sv AND 42 AND -comment
toggle_exclusions.el contains EXCL_TOGGLE AND scan_en AND 01 AND -comment

assertions.description: fsm_exclusions.el uses EXCL_FSM_STATE with state name
assertions.check: fsm_exclusions.el contains EXCL_FSM_STATE AND RESET_STATE AND -comment
functional_exclusions.el contains EXCL_COVBIN AND cg_uart_tx AND cp_parity AND bin_none AND -comment

test_cases.name: Sign-off report: green banner when DV-F passes
test_cases.description: When all DV-F criteria are met, verify the sign-off report shows a green READY FOR SIGN-OFF banner.

assertions.description: HTML banner contains READY FOR SIGN-OFF
Recommended Actions section says no actions required
